title: Arsonage
body:
### Arsonage is a mod which aims to expand upon the fire-related aspects of Minecraft through a few additions.

 

## Additions as of now:
**Blaze Amulet** - When in your inventory, coming into contact with fire or hot blocks causes fire resistance to be granted for 30 seconds, after which there's a cooldown period of 2 minutes.

![Blaze Amulet being used](https://i.postimg.cc/sXgPWws4/blazeamuletdemonstration.gif)

**Scorch** - An enchantment similar to Fire Aspect, but ignites all enemies within distance of the player, distance increasing based on enchantment level (max 3). Which mobs are affected by Scorch is configurable. By default, allays, villagers, wandering traders, iron golems, cats, wolves, and happy ghasts are unaffected by Scorch's secondary effect, but will still be set on fire if directly hit.

![Scorch enchantment being used](https://i.postimg.cc/Wzf5zxZZ/scorchdemonstration.gif)

### That's all?
I really want to add more features to this mod, but I really need your feedback to make it possible. Any suggestions, big or small, can go a long way in the scope of this mod's development. I want to know what the community wants so I can deliver in places where vanilla seems lacking.

You may use this in your modpack with due credit.

 

Please enjoy!
